name: Uniswap V4
special_mechanism_summary: Uniswap V4 is a singleton architecture with lifecycle hooks (before/afterSwap, before/afterAddLiquidity, before/afterRemoveLiquidity, before/afterInitialize) and flash accounting via EIP-1153 transient storage — balances are only settled at end of a lock scope, allowing mid-execution token borrowing without collateral. Supports native ETH and dynamic per-transaction fees.
notes: C3' combination potential: highest-potential Ethereum CLMM — hook contracts execute arbitrary logic at swap lifecycle, enabling cross-protocol reads (Aave borrow rate, oracle prices) mid-swap; flash accounting via transient storage allows collateral-free within-lock borrowing spanning any pool operation, structurally more powerful than standard flashloans; freshly deployed (late 2024), composability assumptions not yet fully stress-tested.
